title: microliabum candidum
intro: Microliabum candidum, also known as white false flax or white false flaxen, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Microliabum candidum, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to treat various health conditions, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
